stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, or manifest change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent fourth-seal mechanical review passed. All 420 frozen fixtures and 420 independently authored fresh probes produced the expected real-engine outcomes across all 24 candidates. Fresh probes covered visible asterisk, underscore, combined strong-plus-italic, link-nested, emoji, and punctuation emphasis; plain, bold-only, unmatched, escaped, raw HTML, code, fenced-code, image-alt, zero-width, HTML-comment-only, and braille-blank collisions; exact Level 2 block anatomy; wrong heading depth, final block kind, extra blocks, and displaced italics. The 248 accepted records had no ID, target, contentVariant, or full-vocabulary collision. The full prepublication suite passed 8,492 tests while the runtime bank remained at 248. The intentional hidden-comment-only list-item boundary remains accepted, and wording, case, spelling, punctuation, meaning, vocabulary, and target prose remain outside grading.
